strategy: Round 1 he summons three Numbskull Ogres and Blinding Lights the team (accuracy down) — use accuracy enchants or clear the debuff.
Round 2 he gives his whole side Guardian Spirit (revives once at 100% health after defeat) — so your first kill on each enemy is undone. Plan to kill each target twice.
He resists all schools 30% and hits hard (+100% outgoing), so hit Storm into his Myth and keep shields up.
Blade and AoE the ogres plus Meowiarty together, then repeat the AoE to finish the revived enemies.
He can't be stunned, so rely on shields for his big hits.
cheatNotes: Late wizards get an Earthquake once his minions are down — join on time.
He opens by summoning three Numbskull Ogres and Blinding Lights the whole team (lowered accuracy).
Round 2 he casts an AoE Guardian Spirit on his side — every enemy revives once at full health, so plan to kill each twice.
